title: How do I close my account? (Ref: #1001)
description: I am no longer running my website and would like to completely delete my account and purge all stored client information. Contact customer at customer1@example.com.

title: Add CSV/XLSX export option for audit logs (Ref: #1002)
description: We need the ability to export our monthly activity logs and ticket history into a CSV or Excel sheet for security audits. Contact customer at customer2@example.com.

title: Blank screen on saving user profile details (Ref: #1003)
description: I am attempting to update my email address in the profile settings page, but clicking 'Save' results in a white screen of death and the data does not update. Contact customer at customer3@example.com.

title: Subscription showing as inactive after successful charge (Ref: #1004)
description: My credit card statement shows a successful charge of $99 on June 1st, but when I log in, my plan still says 'Free Trial (Expired)'. Contact customer at customer4@example.com.

title: Bulk ticket reassignment functionality (Ref: #1005)
description: Currently we have to assign tickets one by one. It would save a lot of time if we could select 50 tickets and reassign them in bulk. Contact customer at customer5@example.com.

title: Add custom tags/labels to customer contacts (Ref: #1006)
description: We need to tag customers with labels like 'VIP', 'Enterprise', or 'Trial' to prioritize conversations in our queues. Contact customer at customer6@example.com.

title: SQL Injection vulnerability in search bar (Ref: #1007)
description: Our security scanner flagged the search input field because it does not sanitize single quotes, allowing potential database table manipulation. Contact customer at customer7@example.com.

title: Thank you note to the support representative (Ref: #1008)
description: Just wanted to say that Sarah did a fantastic job resolving our billing issue yesterday. The response was fast and helpful! Contact customer at customer8@example.com.

title: Auto-renewal failed but credit card is active (Ref: #1009)
description: My subscription was cancelled because auto-renewal failed, but my card on file has plenty of funds and doesn't expire until 2029. Contact customer at customer9@example.com.

title: Unexpected extra charges on last invoice (Ref: #1010)
description: My last invoice shows an extra charge of $15.00 for 'API Add-on' which I never subscribed to. Please audit this billing line item. Contact customer at customer10@example.com.

title: Critical: Checkout fails on card payment (Ref: #1011)
description: I tried purchasing the subscription, but every time I click 'Pay Now', the screen freezes and returns a processing failure. My card was charged once but order is not placed. Contact customer at customer11@example.com.

title: Request for annual invoice PDF (Ref: #1012)
description: I need the PDF invoices for the last 3 billing cycles (March, April, May 2026) for our company tax filings. They are not visible in my dashboard. Contact customer at customer12@example.com.

title: Need Google OAuth / SSO integration (Ref: #1013)
description: Our company enforces Google SSO for security. We request Google Workspace login integration so team members don't need separate passwords. Contact customer at customer13@example.com.

title: Form submission returns 500 server error (Ref: #1014)
description: Submitting the onboarding form returns a 500 Internal Server Error. Please see if the server logs indicate why database write failed. Contact customer at customer14@example.com.

title: Bulk ticket reassignment functionality (Ref: #1015)
description: Currently we have to assign tickets one by one. It would save a lot of time if we could select 50 tickets and reassign them in bulk. Contact customer at customer15@example.com.

title: Add custom tags/labels to customer contacts (Ref: #1016)
description: We need to tag customers with labels like 'VIP', 'Enterprise', or 'Trial' to prioritize conversations in our queues. Contact customer at customer16@example.com.

title: Requesting corporate billing discount details (Ref: #1017)
description: We are looking to scale our team from 10 to 50 users. Is there a corporate discount available, and can we pay via purchase order/invoice instead of card? Contact customer at customer17@example.com.

title: Thank you note to the support representative (Ref: #1018)
description: Just wanted to say that Sarah did a fantastic job resolving our billing issue yesterday. The response was fast and helpful! Contact customer at customer18@example.com.

description: My subscription was cancelled because auto-renewal failed, but my card on file has plenty of funds and doesn't expire until 2029. Contact customer at customer19@example.com.

description: My last invoice shows an extra charge of $15.00 for 'API Add-on' which I never subscribed to. Please audit this billing line item. Contact customer at customer20@example.com.

title: Requesting dark mode support in dashboard (Ref: #1021)
description: Working late at night is straining my eyes. It would be amazing to have a toggle to switch the entire application UI to a dark theme. Contact customer at customer21@example.com.

title: General query regarding platform uptime SLA (Ref: #1022)
description: Where can we find your Service Level Agreement (SLA) terms regarding service availability, uptime guarantees, and refund eligibility? Contact customer at customer22@example.com.

description: I am attempting to update my email address in the profile settings page, but clicking 'Save' results in a white screen of death and the data does not update. Contact customer at customer23@example.com.

title: Subscription showing as inactive after successful charge (Ref: #1024)
description: My credit card statement shows a successful charge of $99 on June 1st, but when I log in, my plan still says 'Free Trial (Expired)'. Contact customer at customer24@example.com.

title: Where is your server hosting location? (Ref: #1025)
description: To comply with local data regulations (GDPR), we need to confirm whether our data is hosted in the US, EU, or AP region. Contact customer at customer25@example.com.

title: Unable to reset password - token invalid email link (Ref: #1026)
description: The link sent via password reset email says 'Invalid Token' immediately upon clicking. I cannot log in. Contact customer at customer26@example.com.

title: Provide API endpoint to fetch team statistics (Ref: #1027)
description: We want to build a custom internal dashboard. Can you expose a public REST API endpoint that returns historical response time metrics? Contact customer at customer27@example.com.

title: Images not uploading in chat window (Ref: #1028)
description: Attempting to attach a JPG image (size 1.2MB) to a support chat ticket results in an endless uploading spinner and fails to send. Contact customer at customer28@example.com.

title: Requesting PDF generation tool for generated charts (Ref: #1029)
description: It would be very helpful if we could export the analytics charts on the dashboard as high-quality PDFs for our monthly executive board slides. Contact customer at customer29@example.com.

title: Broken CSS styling on dark mode toggle (Ref: #1030)
description: Switching to dark mode makes the table text invisible because the text remains dark grey against the dark background. Contact customer at customer30@example.com.

title: Charged twice for the monthly plan (Ref: #1031)
description: I was charged $49.00 twice on June 5th for my monthly plan. Please refund the duplicate transaction. Contact customer at customer31@example.com.

title: Request for annual invoice PDF (Ref: #1032)
description: I need the PDF invoices for the last 3 billing cycles (March, April, May 2026) for our company tax filings. They are not visible in my dashboard. Contact customer at customer32@example.com.

title: Feedback on the new onboarding tutorial (Ref: #1033)
description: The new onboarding flow is a bit confusing. The third tooltip covers the 'Next' button on smaller laptop screen resolutions. Contact customer at customer33@example.com.

title: Request for Slack notification webhook integration (Ref: #1034)
description: We would love to receive real-time alerts in our engineering Slack channel when a new P1 critical bug is reported in the system. Contact customer at customer34@example.com.

title: API rate limiting triggering incorrectly on standard accounts (Ref: #1035)
description: Our integration is blocked because we receive '429 Too Many Requests' after only 5 requests/minute. The documentation says the limit is 100. Contact customer at customer35@example.com.

title: How to change the notification email address? (Ref: #1036)
description: I want the alerts to be sent to dev-alerts@ourcompany.com, but my primary account email is admin@ourcompany.com. How do I decouple them? Contact customer at customer36@example.com.

title: Partnership proposal inquiry (Ref: #1037)
description: I represent a software consultancy and would love to discuss a partnership to integrate your ticket system into our clients' CRMs. Contact customer at customer37@example.com.
